summary: Made two surgical seam edits: rewrote the opening to begin with Marisol's action rather than a neighboring smell-time scaffold, and tightened the closing handoff into the station approach so Chapter 16's platform sequence lands more cleanly.
edits: Recast the opening around Marisol feeding the printer to diversify chapter entry construction while preserving the same sensory setup.
Removed the duplicated printer-load beat from the following paragraph after moving that action into the opening.
Adjusted the final approach paragraph to foreground the passcard and the sewage note carrying forward into the public stop.
